name: Bread and Cheese Casserole
recipeIngredient: 6 slices bread (white, wheat, buns or leftover bread)
1/2 cup butter, or more if you like
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Toast and cut the bread into smaller pieces.
3. In a 9x13 pan, layer bread with onions, green pepper, tomatoes, and cheese.
4. Season with salt and pepper as desired and sprinkle Parmesan cheese over all.
5. Dot the mixture with butter.
6. Pour milk and beaten eggs over the casserole.
7. Bake for 40 minutes or until the milk has absorbed and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
8. Makes 3 servings
